[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / atan2

# Method: atan2()

```ts
atan2(y, x): number;
```

Calculate the angle from a vector's y and x components.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `y` | `number` | Y component. |
| `x` | `number` | X component. |

## Returns

`number`

Angle in radians.

## Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="atan2" encoded-code="-IHsKCXQucmVzaXplQ2FudmFzKHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lcldpZHRoLCB3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJIZWlnaHQpOwp9KTs" />
